summary: Iteration 40 - Ubuntoo page (/ubuntoo) comprehensive frontend testing. All 21 features verified working correctly. Page matches prototype with dark theme, rainbow gradients, glassmorphic cards, hover effects, and proper French accents.
seed_data_creation: None - static demo data in component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ubuntoo page at /ubuntoo is fully functional. All 6 tabs work (Accueil, Profil, Groupes, Discussions, Mentorat, Impact). Active tab shows orange highlight. Tooltip on 'Ubuntoo' word shows Ubuntu philosophy. Hover effects work on cards (translateY(-4px)). French accents render correctly. Re'Actif Pro logo links to /dashboard.

page_load.details: Ubuntoo page loads at /ubuntoo with dark theme (#0d1117) and radial gradient background

navigation_tabs.details: 6 tabs visible and clickable: Accueil, Profil, Groupes, Discussions, Mentorat, Impact

active_tab_orange.details: Active tab shows orange color rgb(249, 115, 22) via CSS class .ub-nav-link.active

reactif_pro_logo.details: Re'Actif Pro logo in navbar is visible and clickable with href=/dashboard

ubuntoo_logo_brand_tag.details: Ubuntoo logo visible next to brand tag 'x Ubuntoo'

hero_section.details: Hero section with Ubuntoo logo + rainbow gradient title 'Je suis parce que nous sommes...'

tooltip_ubuntu_philosophy.details: Tooltip on 'Ubuntoo' word shows Ubuntu philosophy story on hover (visibility: visible, opacity: 1)

value_cards.details: 3 value cards (Ubuntu/Entraide/Croissance) with colored top borders (orange/cyan/purple)

kpi_cards.details: 3 KPI cards (+35%, -40%, 85%) with colored left borders and large values

offer_cards.details: 6 offer cards with icons (Communauté, Badges, Échanges, Accompagnement, Ressources, Réseau)

transformation_path.details: 4 transformation steps (Accompagné → Pair-aidant → Mentor → Ambassadeur) with 3 arrows

cta_section.details: CTA section with rainbow gradient title and 2 buttons (D'CLIC PRO, ALT&ACT)

profil_tab.details: Profile card with gradient avatar, rainbow trust bar, badges, 'Simuler progression' button works

groupes_tab.details: 4 group cards (Reconversion, Handicap, Numérique, VSI) with top borders. Clicking shows filtered exchanges

discussions_tab.details: 4 filter buttons work (Tous/Questions/Discussions/Entraide). Resolved thread has green left border

mentorat_tab.details: 2 mentor cards with gradient avatars (cyan-purple), ratings (4.8, 4.9), 'Demander un mentorat' buttons

impact_tab.details: 6 impact cards with rainbow progress bars and colored left borders

french_accents.details: French accents display correctly: é, è, ê, à, ç, ô. Words verified: réussite, communauté, réciprocité, expérience

hover_effects.details: Value cards have hover transform effect: translateY(-4px) (matrix(1, 0, 0, 1, 0, -4))

glassmorphic_design.details: Cards use glassmorphic design with rgba backgrounds, backdrop-filter blur, and subtle borders

mocked_api.note: No APIs - fully static frontend component with demo data
